name: Investview, Inc.
summary: Investview, Inc. is a Nevada-based diversified company operating several business units: a direct-to-consumer (DTC) marketing platform via subsidiary Conectiv, LLC offering financial education tools, software, and health/wellness products through independent distributors; a proprietary over-the-counter aesthetics, health, nutrition, and cognitive wellness products division; an early-stage online retail brokerage platform; and a bitcoin mining operation focused on sustainable blockchain business.

products.name: Financial Education Membership
products.description: Membership-based access to financial education content, live/recorded sessions, trade alerts, debt reduction, budgeting, and tax management tools via Conectiv, LLC.

products.name: Health, Nutrition and Cognitive Wellness Products
products.description: Proprietary over-the-counter aesthetics, health, nutrition, and cognitive wellness products distributed via DTC platform and wholesale/retail markets.

products.name: Online Trading Platform
products.description: Early-stage self-directed retail brokerage platform intended to offer online trading services.

products.name: Bitcoin Mining Operation
products.description: Sustainable blockchain business unit that owns and operates bitcoin mining infrastructure, currently located in Northern Europe.

products.name: Apex Program
products.description: Program featuring a guaranteed assets buy-back product administered by third-party vendor Total Protection Plus.

products.name: ndau
products.description: Cryptocurrency product previously sold to customers, with associated asset buy-back guarantee through Total Protection Plus.

partnerships.description: Third-party vendor underwriting, managing, and administering a guaranteed assets buy-back product for Apex program and ndau customers.
Affiliate of Chairman David B. Rothrock providing convertible notes financing to the Company since 2020.
